title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
ARCHITECTURE.md is at 85% with 5 undocumented areas. Add formal module sections for:

1. [MAJOR/missing] src/store/index.js — KV storage wrapper using agentic-store (get/set/del/delete exports). Currently agentic-store is listed as dependency but local store abstraction is undocumented.

2. [MAJOR/partial] src/runtime/embed.js and src/runtime/adapters/ — embed.js, sense.js, voice/openai-tts.js, voice/openai-whisper.js, voice/piper.js, voice/elevenlabs.js, voice/macos-say.js. Only referenced in addendum notes, need formal module sections.

3. [MINOR/partial] src/runtime/sense.js — has full implementation (init/on/start/stop/detect/startWakeWordPipeline/stopWakeWordPipeline/initHeadless/startHeadless/detectFrame) beyond the brief directory structure mention.

4. [MINOR/missing] src/runtime/profiler.js (startMark/endMark/getMetrics/measurePipeline) and src/runtime/latency-log.js (record/p95/reset) — internal runtime utilities.

5. [MINOR/missing] src/detector/sox.js (ensureSox) and src/cli/download-state.js (model download progress state) — utility modules.

Prioritize items 1 and 2 (major severity). Items 3-5 can be brief entries in the directory tree or a utilities subsection.
